title: Doors Achievement Sound
description: A simple resource-pack that replaces the achievement sound.
body:
### So, what's the pack is doing?

Like the name says, it replaces the achievement sound in the game, with the achievement sound from [Door's Roblox](https://www.roblox.com/games/6516141723/DOORS) game. Also, it has **no special properties** for completing the challenge, it's actually sound the same.

[Here](https://youtu.be/2wQ2AG1cKPM) is a video, that discribes what the pack is doing.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2wQ2AG1cKPM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### And why would I need that?

This pack is created for one horror build, so you can use it too when going through the horror build!

** **

**That's it**. If anyone wants it, I can release a full version that uses the sounds and textures from this game. But, I honestly don't know what for.
